since_last: 35% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.10%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.44% · BTC -0.18% · Gold -0.07% · Nasdaq100 -1.72%. 35% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.10%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.10%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -10.41%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +6.48%, ADBE +5.42%, WDAY +4.81%, NOW +4.27%, INTU +4.03%. Laggards: TER -10.41%, INTC -10.24%, AMBA -8.80%, AMAT -8.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.94% at $150.9
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.94% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
